About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long LINC dominates today's rankings at position #1 with an exceptional 95.6 score, driven by explosive long-term returns including a 1,280% 10-year gain and 497% 5-year return that significantly outpace SPY (1,048% and 429% respectively). The stock shows textbook momentum quality with all four moving average crossovers confirmed, a "clean" momentum signal, and "strong_buy" classification, though its 1.902 volatility ratio warrants awareness of elevated price swings. FTI ranks second with a 632% 5-year return that crushes SPY's performance, but reveals a critical weakness: its 10-year return of 214.79% trails SPY by 17 points, suggesting earlier periods of underperformance or valuation reset that contrast with recent strength. Both stocks pass momentum ratio thresholds and trade above all major moving averages, indicating sustained uptrends, though LINC's superior consistency across all time horizons and stronger outperformance metrics explain its top ranking.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
